creating-folders-and-files.label: Kreye Dosye ak Fichye
creating-folders-and-files.summary: Sèvi ak mkdir, mkdir -p, ak touch pou konstwi yon estrikti pwojè pwòp nan tèminal Linux la.

creating-folders-and-files-try-it-1.title: Travay final: kreye yon dosye ak mkdir
creating-folders-and-files-try-it-1.prompt: Kreye yon dosye pou nòt klas la. Lanse `mkdir school-notes`.
creating-folders-and-files-try-it-1.hint: Sèvi ak katab ak non fichye egzak ki nan kòmand lan, epi kouri ls, cat, oswa find pou verifye travay ou.

help.concept: Yon tach 'Eseye li' pèmèt ou pratike kòmand ki soti nan leson an nan yon espas travay reyèl.
help.hint_1: Kreye dosye paran anvan ou kreye oswa deplase fichye yo.
help.hint_2: Tcheke travay ou ak ls, cat, oswa find anvan ou klike sou Tcheke.

creating-folders-and-files-try-it-1.starterCode: # Use the terminal for this Linux task.

0.message: Pa itilize sudo pou travay espas travay pou debutan.

creating-folders-and-files-try-it-2.title: Travay final: kreye dosye anbreye ak mkdir -p
creating-folders-and-files-try-it-2.prompt: Konfigire yon eskelèt pwojè senp. Kouri `mkdir -p project-kit/src project-kit/docs`.
creating-folders-and-files-try-it-2.hint: Sèvi ak katab ak non fichye egzak ki nan kòmand lan, epi kouri ls, cat, oswa find pou verifye travay ou.

help.concept: Yon tach "Try It" pèmèt ou pratike kòmand ki nan leson an nan yon espas travay reyèl.
help.hint_1: Kreye dosye paran anvan ou kreye oswa deplase fichye yo.
help.hint_2: Tcheke travay ou ak ls, cat, oswa find anvan ou klike sou Check.

creating-folders-and-files-try-it-2.starterCode: # Use the terminal for this Linux task.

0.message: Pa itilize sudo pou travay espas travay pou debutan.

creating-folders-and-files-try-it-3.title: Travay final: kreye fichye vid ak touch
creating-folders-and-files-try-it-3.prompt: Dosye `touch-lab` la pare pou de fichye planifikasyon. Kouri `touch touch-lab/todo.txt touch-lab/agenda.txt`.
creating-folders-and-files-try-it-3.hint: Sèvi ak katab ak non fichye egzak ki nan kòmand lan, epi kouri ls, cat, oswa find pou verifye travay ou.

help.concept: Yon tach "Try It" pèmèt ou pratike kòmand ki nan leson an nan yon espas travay reyèl.
help.hint_1: Kreye dosye paran anvan ou kreye oswa deplase fichye yo.
help.hint_2: Tcheke travay ou ak ls, cat, oswa find anvan ou klike sou Check.

touch_lab_readme_txt.content: This folder is ready for touch practice.

try_creating_folders_and_files_sketch0.title: Eseye li poukont ou: kreye yon dosye ak mkdir
try_creating_folders_and_files_sketch0.prompt: Kouri `mkdir school-notes` pou kreye yon dosye.

try_creating_folders_and_files_sketch1.title: Eseye l poukont ou: kreye dosye anbreye ak mkdir -p
try_creating_folders_and_files_sketch1.prompt: Kouri `mkdir -p project-kit/src project-kit/docs` pou kreye dosye anbreye an yon sèl etap.

try_creating_folders_and_files_sketch2.title: Eseye l poukont ou: kreye fichye vid ak touch
try_creating_folders_and_files_sketch2.prompt: Kouri `touch touch-lab/todo.txt touch-lab/agenda.txt` pou ajoute de fichye vid nan dosye ki egziste deja a.

sc-mkdir-basic-purpose.title: Idantifye objektif kòmandman an
sc-mkdir-basic-purpose.prompt: Ki travay prensipal `mkdir` la nan tèminal Linux la?
sc-mkdir-basic-purpose.hint: Panse si li kreye yon dosye, kreye yon fichye, oswa montre atik ki egziste deja.

help.concept: `mkdir` Sa vle di kreye repètwa, epi yon repètwa se yon lòt non pou yon dosye.
help.hint_1: Kòmand sa a chanje estrikti espas travay la lè li ajoute yon kontenè pou fichye.
help.hint_2: Li pa afiche kontni yo e li pa kreye yon fichye tèks òdinè.

options.c: Lis fichye yo nan dosye aktyèl la

mc-when-to-use-mkdir-p.title: Chwazi pi bon fason pou itilize mkdir -p
mc-when-to-use-mkdir-p.prompt: Ki kòmand ki itilize kòrèkteman `mkdir -p` pou kreye dosye anndan dosye pou yon pwojè klas? Chwazi tout sa ki aplike.
mc-when-to-use-mkdir-p.hint: Chèche kòmand ki kreye yon chemen ki gen ladan dosye paran yo.

help.concept: `mkdir -p` Yo itilize l lè ou vle kreye yon chemen dosye konplè, ki gen ladan l dosye paran ki ka poko egziste.
help.hint_1: Yon chemen anbrete gen barèt, tankou `course/week1/notes`.
help.hint_2: Chwazi kòmand yo kote yon sèl kòmand ka kreye plizyè nivo dosye san danje.

mc-valid-project-setup.title: Chwazi kòmand ki mete fichye ak dosye yo kòrèkteman.
mc-valid-project-setup.prompt: Ou ap kòmanse yon pwojè lekti. Ki kòmand ki ta kreye atik yo mande yo kòrèkteman? Chwazi tout sa ki aplike.
mc-valid-project-setup.hint: Chèche kòmand ki koresponn ak tip atik la: dosye ak yon kòmand, fichye ak yon lòt.

help.concept: Sèvi ak `mkdir` oswa `mkdir -p` pou dosye yo ak `touch` pou fichye yo. Korespondans ant kòmand la ak tip atik la se lide kle a.
help.hint_1: Yon dosye tankou `reading` bezwen yon kòmand repètwa.
help.hint_2: Yon fichye tankou `reading/list.txt` ka kreye ak `touch` yon fwa chemen dosye a egziste, oswa lè w itilize yon chemen konplè apre w fin kreye dosye a.

dr-folder-setup-order.title: Kòmande etap enstalasyon yo
dr-folder-setup-order.prompt: Mete aksyon final sa yo nan yon lòd ki fè sans pou kreye yon nouvo espas travay nòt epi verifye li.
dr-folder-setup-order.hint: Kreye dosye a anvan ou deplase ladan l, epi kreye fichye a apre ou fin antre ladan l.

help.concept: Yon pwosesis travay ki an sekirite nan tèminal la se kreye yon dosye, antre ladan l si sa nesesè, kreye fichye ladan l, epi enspekte rezilta a.
help.hint_1: Ou pa ka kreye yon `todo.txt` andedan yon `notes` jiskaske yon `notes` egziste oswa ou presize yon chemen konplè.
help.hint_2: Etap verifikasyon an dwe fèt nan fen an, apre dosye a ak fichye a fin kreye.

ci-create-single-folder.title: Kreye yon dosye pwojè
ci-create-single-folder.prompt: Ou kreye yon dosye "`projects`" nan tèminal la epi ou vle pwouve li te mache. Ki aksyon swivan ki fè rezilta a vizib?
ci-create-single-folder.hint: Chwazi aksyon ki montre nouvo dosye a apre ou fin kreye li.

help.concept: `mkdir` Kreye yon dosye nan repètwa aktyèl la, epi ``ls`` se yon fason rapid pou konfime ke dosye a parèt kounye a nan espas travay la.
help.hint_1: Kreye egzakteman yon sèl dosye ki rele `projects` kote ou ye kounye a.
help.hint_2: Apre ou fin kreye `projects` la, egzekite yon kòmand lis nan menm kote a pou verifyè a ka wè ke ou verifye li.

ci-create-single-folder.template: Apre ou fin kreye yon dosye, li itil pou ____ pou ou ka verifye chanjman an.

fb-touch-purpose.title: Konplete lide kòmandman an
fb-touch-purpose.prompt: Ranpli kòmand ki manke a pou fraz la matche ak konpòtman tèminal Linux la.
fb-touch-purpose.hint: Itilize kòmand ki kreye yon fichye vid si li pa egziste deja.

help.concept: `the missing term` Yo itilize l souvan pou kreye fichye vid rapidman apati de tèminal la.
help.hint_1: Kòmand sa a mache sou fichye, pa sou dosye.
help.hint_2: Se kòmand ou ta itilize pou yon bagay tankou `notes.txt` oswa `todo.txt`.

fb-touch-purpose.template: Pou kreye yon fichye vid ki rele `notes.txt`, sèvi ak `[blank1] notes.txt`.

sketch-1.title: Kreye yon dosye ak mkdir
sketch-1.bodyMarkdown:
`mkdir` creates a new folder in your current location. This is useful when you want to start organizing a project instead of keeping everything in one place.

For example, if you are setting up school notes, you might create a folder named `notes`:

```bash
mkdir notes
ls
```

Step by step:
- `mkdir notes` creates a folder called `notes`.
- `ls` lists what is in the current folder so you can confirm that `notes` now exists.

If `notes` appears in the list, the command worked. A common habit is to run `ls` right after creating something so you can verify the workspace changed the way you expected.

sketch-2.title: Kreye dosye anbrete ak mkdir -p
sketch-2.bodyMarkdown:
Sometimes you need several folders inside each other. `mkdir -p` creates the whole path at once.

Example:

```bash
mkdir -p school/history/week1
ls school
```

Step by step:
- `mkdir -p school/history/week1` creates `school`, then `history` inside it, then `week1` inside that.
- The `-p` option prevents you from having to create each level one by one.
- `ls school` lets you inspect the first folder in that path.

Without `-p`, trying to create a deep path all at once usually fails if the parent folders do not exist yet.

sketch-3.title: Kreye fichye vid ak touch
sketch-3.bodyMarkdown:
`touch` creates an empty file when that file does not already exist. This is a fast way to set up placeholders such as notes, drafts, or checklists.

Example:

```bash
touch todo.txt ideas.txt
ls
```

Step by step:
- `touch todo.txt ideas.txt` creates two empty files.
- `ls` shows both file names in the current folder.

You can also combine folders and files in a small project setup. For example, after creating a `school` folder, you might create `school/reading-list.txt` so the folder already contains a file you plan to use.
